summary: Completed frontend testing of Zomoto Tasks restaurant management system. CRITICAL: Modal overlay bug is NOT fixed - dialog overlay still intercepts all pointer events preventing navigation. Staff role restrictions working perfectly. Task creation flow blocked by modal issue.

ui_bugs.issue: CRITICAL: Modal overlay bug NOT fixed - DialogOverlay with class 'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80' still intercepts pointer events, preventing navigation while modal is open
ui_bugs.technical_details: onPointerDownOutside and onInteractOutside handlers did not resolve the issue. Dialog overlay still blocks all background interactions.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot complete task creation flow - modal overlay blocks navigation and form interactions fail

passed_tests: Dashboard stats display correctly for both roles
Staff role restrictions working perfectly - cannot see Team/Library pages or New Task button
Staff can only see own tasks (4 tasks displayed correctly)
Task status workflow displays correctly (Assigned, In Progress, Verified)
Navigation between pages works when modal is closed
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: The modal overlay bug fix did NOT work. The DialogOverlay component still intercepts all pointer events when modal is open, preventing navigation and form interactions. The onPointerDownOutside and onInteractOutside handlers are insufficient. Need to either: 1) Remove the overlay entirely, 2) Modify the overlay z-index/pointer-events CSS, or 3) Implement proper modal close on outside click. This blocks the entire task creation workflow.
